uk.method: HMRC Cryptoassets Manual, para CG22200 — Section 104 pooling (TCGA 1992 s104)
uk.method_detail: Where the same type of cryptoasset has been acquired at different times, the pooled cost basis approach applies per Taxation of Chargeable Gains Act 1992 section 104.
uk.allowance: HMRC CG18000 — Annual exempt amount £3,000 for 2024/25
uk.allowance_detail: The annual exempt amount for individuals is £3,000 for the 2024/25 tax year (6 April 2024 to 5 April 2025).
uk.rate_basic: HMRC CG22050 — 10% for basic rate taxpayers (income up to £37,700)
uk.rate_higher: HMRC CG22050 — 24% for higher/additional rate taxpayers
uk.price_source: CoinGecko API — exact disposal-date pricing per HMRC Cryptoassets Manual para 3.2
uk.disclaimer: This working paper is produced for informational purposes only. It is not tax advice. All figures must be reviewed by a qualified tax professional before filing. TaxChain accepts no liability for errors arising from incomplete transaction data, API rate limiting, or changes in tax legislation.
uk.signature_prompt: I confirm I have reviewed this working paper and the figures are accurate to the best of my knowledge.

us.method: IRS Notice 2014-21 — virtual currency treated as property for federal tax purposes
us.method_detail: General tax principles applicable to property transactions apply to transactions using virtual currency. Cost basis determined at time of acquisition.
us.rate_long: IRS Publication 544 — 0%/15%/20% long-term capital gains (held >1 year)
us.rate_short: IRS Publication 544 — ordinary income rates up to 37% (held ≤1 year)
us.price_source: CoinGecko API — exact disposal-date pricing per IRS requirements
us.disclaimer: This working paper is produced for informational purposes only. It is not tax advice. All figures must be reviewed by a qualified tax professional before filing.
us.signature_prompt: I confirm I have reviewed this working paper and the figures are accurate to the best of my knowledge.
